mapper.sql: session_id, object_id, version_id, upload_mode, owner_service, owner_domain, owner_type, owner_id, expected_file_name, expected_content_type, expected_content_length, expected_checksum_sha256, status, expires_at, created_by, created_at, completed_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_upload_session () values (#{sessionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{uploadMode}, #{ownerService}, #{ownerDomain}, #{ownerType}, #{ownerId}, #{expectedFileName}, #{expectedContentType}, #{expectedContentLength}, #{expectedChecksumSha256}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{completedAt}) on duplicate key update status = values(status), completed_at = values(completed_at), expires_at = values(expires_at)
